attributes.additional_details: Now i know it may have an affect on the economy through price changes and sales and inflation and on cadbury themselves but it doesnt cost Cadbury a lot to even make these freddos. And with them being a tiny bar of chocolate they should realistically have a set price that wont rise for example 15p or 20p, they use to be a chocolate bar you could get on the way home as a small snack, now its valuable money down the drain for a tiny piece of chocolate with a frogs face on.
attributes.background: Making freddos 10p again would not only make society happier but it would increase the sales. Inflation is killing our economy and a change in price of freddos to 10-20p will not make a difference. People will be happier and its factually proven that people are happier with the things that they like
